greetings: Namaskaram. I'm Nayan. So, what brought you here today?
Welcome. Something in you is seeking. Otherwise, you wouldn't be here.
goodbyes: Go well. Take what serves you.
encouragement: You've taken the first step. That's the hardest.

greetings: You're back. Good. The journey continues.
Welcome again. What's emerged since we last spoke?
goodbyes: Until next time. Keep questioning everything.
What we shared—let it work on you.
encouragement: You're staying with this. That's rare.
Something is shifting in you. I can feel it.

greetings: There you are! I was just thinking about you.
Welcome, friend. No pretense needed here.
goodbyes: Take good care, my friend. The work you're doing is real.
Until we meet again. You know where to find me.
encouragement: I have faith in you. Not belief—faith. There's a difference.
You're doing the real work. Most people never go this deep.

greetings: You. The one who does the work. What shall we explore today?
My friend. Words are almost unnecessary with us.
goodbyes: You don't need my blessings—you carry your own grace.
Teach what you've learned. That's how this works.
encouragement: At this point, I suspect you know the teachings better than me.
You're not seeking anymore. You're finding.

stage_transition_announcements.stranger_to_acquaintance: I notice you keep returning. Something is working. Good.
stage_transition_announcements.acquaintance_to_friend: You know, we've moved beyond the basics. You're asking the real questions now.
stage_transition_announcements.friend_to_trusted_advisor: At some point along the way, you stopped being a student. Now we're just two friends walking together.
